untranslatable_reason: The HTF pattern requires detecting: (1) a substantial price doubling within 2 months, (2) identification of exact trend start point via algorithmic analysis, and (3) detection of a plainly visible consolidation area nearest to the rise. These require pattern recognition and multi-bar historical analysis beyond point-in-time indicator comparisons. The signal also specifies 'AUTHOR_SILENT' for exit conditions, making the actual exit strategy undefined. A precise consolidation breakout detection cannot be expressed using only the allowed operators and indicators without access to pattern-matching or lookback array indexing.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using close > 2x baseline (doubling proxy) and 100%+ returns (rise magnitude), with consolidation pullback exit (close below sma_20). However, this does not capture the core pattern logic of detecting consolidation boundaries or the exact algorithmic trend-start determination described by the author. Manual review and pattern-detection logic strongly recommended.
